CustomField.description: When selected, the system will display a warning if a contract-specific allocation (e.g., payment on account, payable, LOC drawdown, credit application) is applied to invoices from another contract under the same lessee. Cash payments are excluded. Users can choose to override the warning and proceed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When selected, the system will display a warning if a contract-specific allocation (e.g., payment on account, payable, LOC drawdown, credit application) is applied to invoices from another contract under the same lessee. Cash payments are excluded. Users can choose to override the warning and proceed.
CustomField.label: Prevent Cross Contract Application
